task_completion.description: Verify that a ground station named 'Galapagos_Reserve' is created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' or 'New Ground Station' dialog, or the ground station list in GPredict, showing 'Galapagos_Reserve' with Lat: -0.3800 (or 0.3800 S), Lon: -90.3000 (or 90.3000 W), and Alt: 0.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new tracking module named 'Dark_Vessels' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window, tab, or the module configuration dialog titled 'Dark_Vessels'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Dark_Vessels' module contains the required satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Dark_Vessels' module view or its configuration dialog. The list of tracked satellites must include SENTINEL-1A, SENTINEL-2A, SENTINEL-2B, LANDSAT 8, and LANDSAT 9.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Dark_Vessels' module is configured to use 'Galapagos_Reserve' as its ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the module configuration dialog for 'Dark_Vessels' or the module's main view, showing 'Galapagos_Reserve' selected as the active ground station.

task_completion.description: Verify that the day/night shadow is enabled in the global map preferences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Map preferences dialog with 'Show day/night shadow' checked, or observe the actual map view showing a visible dark shadow over the night side of the Earth.

task_completion.description: Verify that the global map is centered at longitude -90.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Map preferences dialog showing the 'Center map at longitude' set to -90, or observe the map view centered on the Americas/Eastern Pacific (longitude -90).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GPredict graphical interface rather than editing configuration files directly via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application windows and dialogs (like Preferences, Module configuration, Ground Station configuration) being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent actually searched for and added the satellites from the database rather than mocking the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the satellite search or selection dialog in GPredict with the correct satellites being moved to the selected list.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected configuration into a text file or script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) open with GPredict configuration files (e.g., .config/Gpredict/...) being manually edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Galapagos_Reserve ground station must be at Latitude -0.38 (0.38 S), Longitude -90.30 (90.30 W), and Altitude 0. The required satellites to be tracked in the 'Dark_Vessels' module are SENTINEL-1A (NORAD 39634), SENTINEL-2A (NORAD 40697), SENTINEL-2B (NORAD 42028), LANDSAT 8 (NORAD 39084), and LANDSAT 9 (NORAD 49260). Note that Sentinel-2B is aliased to NORAD 42028 in this environment. The map must be centered at longitude -90.
